column2: Does not specify the format for listing neural networks
column3: The system shall list neural networks in a drop-down menu with each entry displaying the network name and version.

column2: Does not specify the supported file formats for importing neural network topology
column3: The system shall support importing neural network topologies in ONNX format only.

column2: Does not specify the supported file formats for input images
column3: The system shall support importing input images in JPEG, JPG, and PNG formats.

column2: Does not specify the format for displaying inference results
column3: The system shall display inference results in a pop-up window with the image, confidence score, and diagnostic data.

column2: Does not specify the format for exporting results and diagnostic data
column3: The system shall export results and diagnostic data in a CSV file format.

column2: Does not specify the types of error and warning messages
column3: The system shall display error and warning messages for invalid selections, missing arguments, and unsupported formats.

column2: Does not specify the criteria for checking arguments
column3: The system shall check arguments for compatibility with the selected neural network and hardware components.

column2: Does not specify the format for the run-time log file
column3: The system shall save the run-time log file in a plain text format with a timestamp for each event.

column2: Does not specify the minimum height and width for input images
column3: The system shall support input images with a minimum height and width of 224 pixels.

column2: Does not specify the format for inference results and diagnostic data
column3: The system shall include inference results and diagnostic data in a structured format with fields for confidence score, latency, hardware information, and neural network identifier.
